posts.author: dashevsky (Rachel Dashevsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I’d like for ‘saved’ automations to have the capabilities to hold:

a) preset messages with the ‘auto populate’ fields connected

b) specific timeline(s) to receive the automation before the related date field

c) the ‘notifier’ to be preset

d) the option for “every ‘board’ created under this ‘dashboard’/and or ‘folder’, automation XYZ auto populates” with the option to mute the automation if needed, having the new board default with the automation populated

e) for the automation function to have capabilities to pull the “dashboard” name and “folder” name into the notification message

Thank you for reading my request! Hope to see it soon!
